name: Pan Di Spagna- Basic Genoise (Sponge Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the cake flour and cornstarch with a pinch of salt.
2. In another large bowl, beat the eggs and egg yolks until just combined.
3. Gradually add the sugar to the egg mixture, beating constantly until the mixture is thick and pale, about 15 minutes on high speed.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Sift the dry ingredients over the egg mixture and fold gently with a wooden spoon or rubber spatula until just combined.
6. Grease two 10-inch round cake pans with shortening.
7. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared pans.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45-50 minutes, or until the cakes spring back when touched.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool on wire racks.
10. Once cooled, use a long serrated knife to remove the cake tops.
11. For tiramisu or other layered cakes, cut each cake into three uniform layers.
Serves: 2
